fcm_v1_api_examples.note: Replace YOUR_PROJECT_ID and YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN with actual values

notification.title: Request Accepted
notification.body: Your request for Banana has been accepted by farmer John

notification.title: Weather Alert
notification.body: Heavy rain expected in your area. Protect your crops!

notification.title: App Update Available
notification.body: New features and bug fixes are available

notification.title: Market Price Update
notification.body: Tomato prices have increased by 15% today

notification.title: Community Update
notification.body: New farming techniques workshop this weekend

testing_tips.1: Use FCM console for quick testing: https://console.firebase.google.com/project/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/notification
testing_tips.2: Test with different device states: foreground, background, killed
testing_tips.3: Verify data payload structure matches your app's expectations
testing_tips.5: Check notification persistence in Firebase Firestore
testing_tips.6: Validate notification icons and colors on different devices

important_notes.authentication: Use Firebase Admin SDK service account key for server-side sending
important_notes.token_management: Device tokens can change, implement token refresh mechanism
important_notes.data_structure: Keep data payload consistent with your app's notification mapping
important_notes.testing: Test both notification and data-only messages
important_notes.limits: FCM has rate limits and payload size restrictions (4KB max)
important_notes.persistence: Use Firestore to persist notifications for offline/killed app scenarios
